inputs.text: A game-ready 2D portrait hair or headwear layer for a football player, hair styling or sports cap/headband isolated on transparent-style background, clean hair silhouettes, short to medium athletic hairstyles, game asset texture style, no face, no skin, just hair or headwear as a separate overlay piece, flat shaded, high quality game asset
